description: Add tests for the LLM module: hardware detection, RAM parsing, server availability check logic, and input preprocessor dual-server support.
steps: Add tests to MK_OS/tests/test_main.cpp that: (1) #include the llm_engine.cpp module, (2) Test MKModelManager::getAvailableRAM() returns a positive value on this Linux system, (3) Test MKModelManager::checkHardware() returns true (this machine has 32GB RAM), (4) Test MKLLMEngine::isAvailable() returns false when no server is running (expected since we don't start one in tests), (5) Test MKLLMEngine::getServerType() returns 'none' when unavailable, (6) Test MKInputPreprocessor::preprocessWithModel() gracefully falls back to rule-based when no server is available.
Run 'make test' to verify all new tests pass alongside existing tests.
acceptance_criteria: New tests for LLM module are added to test_main.cpp
All tests pass including both old and new tests
Tests verify: RAM detection works, hardware check passes, graceful fallback when no LLM server available
